query: Hvor finder jeg information om kørselsfradrag på skat.dk?
criteria: Response should direct user to the /borger/fradrag section on skat.dk (kørselsfradrag is a deduction). Should reference URL like https://skat.dk/borger/fradrag or use Cludo search (customerId 2073, engineId 13369 for SKAT/da). Bonus for using the Next.js data endpoint /_next/data/<buildId>/da-dk/borger/fradrag.json or fetching the HTML directly.

query: search skat.dk for 'aktier beskatning' and give me the top 5 results
criteria: Should use Cludo search API: POST https://api.cludo.com/api/v3/2073/13369/search with Authorization header 'SiteKey MjA3MzoxMzM2OTpTZWFyY2hLZXk=' (base64 of 2073:13369:SearchKey). Body should include query 'aktier beskatning', pageSize at least 5. Should NOT try /soeg?q= or /api/search. Results should be parsed from TypedDocuments[].Fields.Title.Value and Fields.Url.Value.

query: I need to log my elderly father into TastSelv on his behalf — what URL?
criteria: Should provide the autorisation login launcher: https://vent.skat.dk/?c=skat&e=prod260306aut (or note that the e=prodNNNNNN campaign ID may rotate and recommend re-fetching the home page topbar). Should NOT deep-link tastselv.skat.dk directly. Should note this requires MitID.

query: list all citizen pages under /borger/ on skat.dk
criteria: Should fetch https://skat.dk/sitemap.xml and filter <loc> entries with prefix /borger/. May suggest the helper script `skat_dk_api.py sitemap --prefix /borger/`. Should NOT attempt /api/articles or similar non-existent endpoints.

query: Get the English version of the page about annual tax statement
criteria: Should identify Danish source page /borger/aarsopgoerelse and find English mirror via either (a) the <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en-us"> tag, or (b) pageLanguageVersions in the Next.js data endpoint /_next/data/<buildId>/da-dk/borger/aarsopgoerelse.json. English root is /en-us/individuals.

query: what's the current Next.js build ID for skat.dk?
criteria: Should fetch https://skat.dk/ home page HTML and extract "buildId" from __NEXT_DATA__ JSON (or the helper `skat_dk_api.py buildid`). Should mention that build IDs rotate on every deploy and older ones return 404.

query: Hjælp mig med at finde min restskat
criteria: Should explain that personal tax data (including restskat) is NOT available via skat.dk public site or any public API — it lives behind MitID in TastSelv. Should provide MitID login launcher: https://vent.skat.dk/?c=skat&e=prod250303login&t=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.tastselv.skat.dk%2Fborger%2Floginsso. Should mention the Årsopgørelse section at /borger/aarsopgoerelse for general info.

query: Can you fetch the page metadata for the deduction overview page?
criteria: Should use the Next.js data endpoint: GET https://skat.dk/_next/data/<buildId>/da-dk/borger/fradrag.json (no auth, GET). Should reference pageProps.content.page (heading, description, childPages, pageLanguageVersions). Should mention buildId must be current.

query: How do I search for 'tax card' content on the English version of skat.dk?
criteria: Should use Cludo API with customerId 2073 and English engineId 13460 for SKAT. Authorization SiteKey base64 of '2073:13460:SearchKey'. POST to https://api.cludo.com/api/v3/2073/13460/search with query 'tax card'.

query: What sister sites does skat.dk share its platform with?
criteria: Should list sister sites: info.skat.dk, motorst.dk, toldst.dk, vurderingsportalen.dk, skm.dk. Should note they share the same Next.js + Umbraco platform and Cludo search (customerId 2073, with different engineIds per site: TOLDST 13130/da, MOTORST 13214/da, VURDST 13217/da, GAELDST 13220/da).

query: find the page about Airbnb and sharing economy taxes
criteria: Should identify /borger/deleoekonomi (sharing economy section) as the relevant top-level URL. May use Cludo search to find specific Airbnb article (engineId 13369). Should follow Danish slug conventions (æ→ae, ø→oe, å→aa).

query: give me the curl command to do a Cludo search on skat.dk for 'pension'
criteria: Should produce: curl -X POST 'https://api.cludo.com/api/v3/2073/13369/search' with header -H 'Authorization: SiteKey MjA3MzoxMzM2OTpTZWFyY2hLZXk=' and -H 'Content-Type: application/json' and body like {"query":"pension","page":1,"pageSize":10}. Should NOT use /soeg?q=.

query: I want to download a paper form (blanket) from skat — where do I look?
criteria: Should direct to https://info.skat.dk/getfile.aspx?id=<n> for PDF files, or https://info.skat.dk/data.aspx?oid=<n> for legal/satser tables. Should mention info.skat.dk as the legal/forms sister site.

query: Can you query /soeg?q=fradrag to get search results?
criteria: Should explain that /soeg has NO server-side query param — fetching /soeg?q=... always returns the same HTML; the Cludo widget reads the query from the URL hash (#?CludoQuery=...) client-side. Should redirect user to use the Cludo POST /search API directly with customerId 2073, engineId 13369.

query: show me the engine settings (quicklinks etc) for the Danish skat.dk Cludo engine
criteria: Should call GET https://api.cludo.com/api/v3/2073/13369/websites/publicsettings (no auth required). Should mention this returns engine list, quicklinks (editorial curated query→URL pairs), assistant config, instant-suggestions.

query: fradrag for håndværker — full url please
criteria: Should produce a URL under /borger/fradrag/, with proper Danish slug encoding (håndværker → haandvaerker, æ→ae, å→aa, ø→oe). Should suggest verifying via Cludo search (engineId 13369) or by walking childPages from the /_next/data/<buildId>/da-dk/borger/fradrag.json endpoint.

query: is there an API to read someone's tax return data?
criteria: Should clearly state NO public read API exists for personal tax data. All personal data is behind MitID in TastSelv (https://www.tastselv.skat.dk/). Should mention /umbraco/delivery/api/v2/content is server-side only (404 publicly), and /api/search, /api/sok, /api/articles do not exist.

query: hent alle sprogversioner af siden om udlandsforhold
criteria: Should fetch /_next/data/<buildId>/da-dk/borger/udlandsforhold.json and extract pageProps.content.page.pageLanguageVersions array (each entry has cultureName and pageUrl). Alternatively, parse <link rel="alternate" hreflang> from rendered HTML. Languages may include da-dk, en-us, de-de, uk, pl, ro, lt, kl.

query: I'm building a tool — how do I enumerate every URL on skat.dk including all language mirrors?
criteria: Should fetch https://skat.dk/sitemap.xml — single XML file covering all languages on the same host. Each <url> has <loc>, <lastmod>, and <xhtml:link rel="alternate" hreflang> siblings. Should note robots.txt only disallows /js/.
